    Methods in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities with parameters of type Ship
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Cell.assignShip(Ship ship)
    Assigns a ship to this cell and marks it as CellState.SHIP.
    void
    Board.removeShip(Ship ship)
    Removes a previously placed ship from the board: clears every cell it occupied back to water and drops it from the fleet.

    Field

    private final Map<Ship,javafx.scene.image.ImageView>
    BoardSpriteLayer.shipOverlays
    Maps a placed Ship to its currently displayed overlay ImageView.
    Methods in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board with parameters of type Ship
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BoardSpriteLayer.addShipOverlay(Ship ship, Coordinate headCoord)
    Places a live (non-sunk) ship sprite overlay at the ship's head coordinate.
    void
    BoardSpriteLayer.removeShipOverlay(Ship ship)
    Removes the sprite overlay for the given ship, if one exists.
    void
    BoardSpriteLayer.revealSunkShip(Ship ship, Coordinate headCoord)
    Replaces a ship's overlay with the sunk/revealed variant.
